title: Pedagogical Flow & Continuity (no sudden jumps)
description: The session must flow smoothly: each concept builds on the previous one and hands off to the next. Nothing appears abruptly without the groundwork having been laid.
criterion: No slide introduces a concept that depends on an idea not yet covered; each section connects logically to the next.

rubric.5: Seamless build-up; every dependency is introduced before it is used.
rubric.1: A concept appears out of nowhere; a hard dependency is used before it is taught.

cases.rationale: Each step depends only on what came before.
Uses duplicate-ACK fast-retransmit before ACK or TCP is even defined — abrupt jump.
